reviews.comment:
Carga de combustible, desayuno y pernocte. Todo excelente, muy bien atendidos por el personal. Buenas habitaciones para hacer noche camino al sur.

(Translated by Google)
Fuel, breakfast, and overnight stay. Everything was excellent, and the staff was very attentive. Good rooms for an overnight stay on the way south.

reviews.comment:
Si no estás dispuesto a esperar más de i a hora por una hamburguesa no pidas en este full.
Sugerencia: o pongan la cantidad de personal adecuado o informen que son el Full con mayor demora en el país...

(Translated by Google)
If you're not willing to wait more than an hour for a burger, don't order from this place.

Suggestion: Either hire more staff or make it clear that you have the longest wait times at this place in the country...
